briefdescription.para: This function returns the parameters for the type of LMS type.

parameterdescription.para: XSecure_LmsType, type of OTS algorithm selected
Pointer to array location where all predefined parameter values are present XSecure_LmsParam

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Valid type is passed, and parameters are assigned
XST_FAILURE - If not a valid type is passed
Return the parameter for below LMS types
'h'=25 variations and 24 bit hash outputs are not supported till date in this library
default, and other not supported options
Two possible glitches, replacing this condition with a NOP, we will update error and exit flipping condition, we update error and exit, so both cases it is OK.
Update register to be taken care by caller
No matter success or failure, call happened successfully

briefdescription.para: This file contains definitions and interface used in LMS.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ---------------------------------------------------------- 5.4 kal 07/24/24 Initial release 5.7 tvp 11/20/25 Code refactoring for platform specific LMS functionality
